mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, CONTENT, BOARD_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_MESSAGE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{senderNo}, #{receiverNo}, #{content}, #{boardNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS senderNickname, M.RECEIVER_NO, M.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sendDate, M.READ_FL, M.BOARD_NO AS boardNo FROM MESSAGE M JOIN MEMBER S ON M.SENDER_NO = S.MEMBER_NO WHERE M.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY M.SEND_DATE DESC

SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS senderNickname, M.RECEIVER_NO, R.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS receiverNickname, M.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sendDate, M.READ_FL, M.BOARD_NO AS boardNo FROM MESSAGE M JOIN MEMBER S ON M.SENDER_NO = S.MEMBER_NO JOIN MEMBER R ON M.RECEIVER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO WHERE M.MESSAGE_NO = #{messageNo} AND (M.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} OR M.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo})

SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS senderNickname, M.RECEIVER_NO, R.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS receiverNickname, M.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sendDate, M.READ_FL, M.BOARD_NO AS boardNo FROM MESSAGE M JOIN MEMBER S ON M.SENDER_NO = S.MEMBER_NO JOIN MEMBER R ON M.RECEIVER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO WHERE M.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} AND M.MESSAGE_DEL_FL = 'N' ORDER BY M.SEND_DATE DESC

SELECT last_msg.MESSAGE_NO, last_msg.SENDER_NO, last_msg.RECEIVER_NO, last_msg.CONTENT as lastMessageContent, last_msg.SEND_DATE as lastMessageTime, last_msg.BOARD_NO as boardNo, last_msg.not_read_count_in_conv as notReadCount,
last_msg.BOARD_CODE as boardCode,
CASE WHEN last_msg.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} THEN last_msg.RECEIVER_NO ELSE last_msg.SENDER_NO END as otherUserNo, (SELECT MEMBER_NICKNAME FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = CASE WHEN last_msg.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} THEN last_msg.RECEIVER_NO ELSE last_msg.SENDER_NO END) as otherUserNickname
FROM ( SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO, M.CONTENT, M.SEND_DATE, M.READ_FL, M.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_CODE,
GREATEST(M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO) as user_max_no, LEAST(M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO) as user_min_no,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LEAST(M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO), GREATEST(M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO), M.BOARD_NO ORDER BY M.SEND_DATE DESC) as rn,
COUNT(CASE WHEN M.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} AND M.READ_FL = 'N' THEN 1 END) OVER (PARTITION BY LEAST(M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO), GREATEST(M.SENDER_NO, M.RECEIVER_NO), M.BOARD_NO) as not_read_count_in_conv
FROM MESSAGE M JOIN BOARD B ON M.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO
WHERE (M.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} OR M.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo}) AND M.MESSAGE_DEL_FL = 'N' -- AND B.BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
) last_msg WHERE last_msg.rn = 1 ORDER BY last_msg.SEND_DATE DESC
